_meta.method: matched ROM (startup,active,recovery,total) + box geometry against community frame data (Baston ESN3S, via sf3_authentic_frame_data.yaml); geometry+timing are ROM-verified, the move-NAME assignment is INFERRED and may be imperfect for low-confidence entries

LIGHT_PUNCH.rationale: fast small jab, chest height, s/a/r approx 3/3/9

HEAVY_PUNCH.rationale: tallest non-moving box, big, s/a/r approx 5/5/25

CROUCH_HEAVY_KICK.rationale: low ground box, long reach, s/a/r approx 6/5/20
